languages.text: "Тщательная декомпозиция ситуации будут способствовать удовлетворительному завершению конфронтации". {n}Техножрец издает негромкую бинарную трель.{/n} "Мои расчетные мощности {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}будут перенаправлены{/d} на вычисление оптимальной оборонительной тактики".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Экзальт
не играет DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead или DL_ExaltPersuaded
Или DL_TraitorExalt
Выдаем Obj2_Cl_Exalt

traits.locale_text: "Тщательная декомпозиция ситуации будут способствовать удовлетворительному завершению конфронтации". {n}Техножрец издает негромкую бинарную трель.{/n} "Мои расчетные мощности будут перенаправлены на вычисление оптимальной оборонительной тактики".
traits.speaker: Exalt117

не играет DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead или DL_ExaltPersuaded

languages.text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."
languages.original_text: "Тщательная декомпозиция ситуации будут способствовать удовлетворительному завершению конфронтации". {n}Техножрец издает негромкую бинарную трель.{/n} "Мои расчетные мощности {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}будут перенаправлены{/d} на вычисление оптимальной оборонительной тактики".

traits.locale_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

"Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity will be redirected to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

"Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity will be redirected to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

languages.text: “审慎分析局势，有助于促成令人满意的对抗结局。”{n}技术神甫发出低沉的二进制颤音。{/n}“我的运算能力{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}将被重新分配{/d}，用于计算最优防御战术。”
languages.original_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

traits.locale_text: “审慎分析局势，有助于促成令人满意的对抗结局。”{n}技术神甫发出低沉的二进制颤音。{/n}“我的运算能力{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}将被重新分配{/d}，用于计算最优防御战术。”

languages.text: « Un cloisonnement minutieux de la situation nous permettra d'assurer une issue satisfaisante à ce conflit. » {n}Le technoprêtre émet un léger trille binhaire.{/n} « Je vais {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}concentrer ma capacité cognitive{/d} de façon à calculer une stratégie de défense optimale. »
languages.original_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

traits.locale_text: « Un cloisonnement minutieux de la situation nous permettra d'assurer une issue satisfaisante à ce conflit. » {n}Le technoprêtre émet un léger trille binhaire.{/n} « Je vais {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}concentrer ma capacité cognitive{/d} de façon à calculer une stratégie de défense optimale. »

languages.text: «Una evaluación correcta de la situación facilitará una conclusión óptima para la confrontación». {n}El tecnosacerdote emite un grave trino binario.{/n} «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}Redirigiré mis capacidades cognitivas{/d} al cálculo de tácticas defensivas idóneas».
languages.original_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

traits.locale_text: «Una evaluación correcta de la situación facilitará una conclusión óptima para la confrontación». {n}El tecnosacerdote emite un grave trino binario.{/n} «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}Redirigiré mis capacidades cognitivas{/d} al cálculo de tácticas defensivas idóneas».

languages.text: "Durumun dikkatli bir şekilde bölümlere ayrılması, çatışmanın tatmin edici bir şekilde sonuçlanmasını kolaylaştıracaktır." {n}Tekno Rahip, alçak bir ikilidil ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Kavramsal kapasitem, en uygun savunma taktiklerini hesaplamaya {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}yönlendirilecek{/d}."
languages.original_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

traits.locale_text: "Durumun dikkatli bir şekilde bölümlere ayrılması, çatışmanın tatmin edici bir şekilde sonuçlanmasını kolaylaştıracaktır." {n}Tekno Rahip, alçak bir ikilidil ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Kavramsal kapasitem, en uygun savunma taktiklerini hesaplamaya {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}yönlendirilecek{/d}."

languages.text: "Eine vorsichtige Unterteilung der Situation wird zu einem zufriedenstellenden Ergebnis führen." {n}Der Techpriester stößt ein tiefes binhärisches Trillern aus.{/n} "Meine cogitale Kapazität {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}wird auf die Berechnung einer optimalen Verteidigungstaktik umgeleitet{/d}."
languages.original_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

traits.locale_text: "Eine vorsichtige Unterteilung der Situation wird zu einem zufriedenstellenden Ergebnis führen." {n}Der Techpriester stößt ein tiefes binhärisches Trillern aus.{/n} "Meine cogitale Kapazität {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}wird auf die Berechnung einer optimalen Verteidigungstaktik umgeleitet{/d}."

languages.text: 「状況を慎重に区分けすることで、対立の満足すべき結末を導き出すことができるだろう。」{n}テクプリストが低いビナリックの三音を発する.{/n}「私の思考能力{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}は最適な防御戦術の計算に振り向けられるだろう。」{/d}
languages.original_text: "Careful partitioning of the situation will facilitate a satisfactory conclusion to the confrontation." {n}The Tech-Priest emits a low binharic trill.{/n} "My cogitational capacity {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}will be redirected{/d} to calculating optimal defensive tactics."

traits.locale_text: 「状況を慎重に区分けすることで、対立の満足すべき結末を導き出すことができるだろう。」{n}テクプリストが低いビナリックの三音を発する.{/n}「私の思考能力{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117Traitor}は最適な防御戦術の計算に振り向けられるだろう。」{/d}
